name: Lesser Void Spawn
description: A writhing mass of void energy given semi-physical form. It looks like living darkness with too many limbs and mouths that open in impossible directions. Created by the Archon as disposable servants.

attacks.name: Void Claw
attacks.description: A slash with claws made of solidified void energy

attacks.name: Void Spit
attacks.description: Spits a glob of corrosive void energy

special_abilities.name: Void Being
special_abilities.description: Immune to poison and disease. Takes double damage from radiant sources.

special_abilities.name: Unstable Form
special_abilities.description: When killed, explodes dealing 1d4 necrotic damage to adjacent enemies

behavior.notes: Mindless minion that rushes toward enemies. Prefers melee but will use Void Spit if can't reach target. Never retreats.
